summary.en: A strategic framework for managing the portfolio of existing businesses you exploit and future businesses you explore, using the Portfolio Map to visualize, analyze, and act on risk, return, and renewal.
summary.zh: 一套管理商业模式组合的战略框架：用业务组合地图同时管理正在开发的现有业务和正在探索的未来业务，并围绕风险、收益和更新动作做决策。

sources.label: Alexander Osterwalder, Yves Pigneur, Fred Etiemble & Alan Smith · The Invincible Company · Wiley · 2020
Strategyzer · Portfolio Map and business model portfolio management

references.label: Alexander Osterwalder, Yves Pigneur, Fred Etiemble & Alan Smith · The Invincible Company · Wiley
references.pages: Portfolio Map, Explore/Exploit, Portfolio Actions, Innovation Metrics, Culture sections

note.en: Canonical source for the Explore/Exploit portfolio distinction, Portfolio Map, and portfolio actions used in this framework.
note.zh: Explore/Exploit 组合区分、业务组合地图和组合动作体系的主要来源。
